title: Leisure Gallery
body:
Artist-run gallery and studio space at 555 Santa Fe Drive in Denver's Santa Fe Arts District. Co-owned by Josh Gondrez. The "No Energy Vamp" music video for Killd By was filmed here in Spring 2015. Described by Westword as "a modest two-room storefront" functioning as an artists' studio.

## Source
- [Westword — Leisure Gallery piece](https://www.westword.com/music/leisure-gallery-offers-a-blank-slate-for-live-music-6886104/)
